description:
The Tella Public API allows you to programmatically access your videos and playlists, including transcripts, chapters, and thumbnails.

## Authentication

All requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer tella_pk_xxxxx...
```

API keys can be generated in your Tella workspace settings.

## Rate Limiting

The API is rate-limited to 100 requests per minute per organization.
Rate limit information is returned in response headers:
- `X-RateLimit-Limit`: Maximum requests per window
- `X-RateLimit-Remaining`: Remaining requests in current window
- `X-RateLimit-Reset`: Unix timestamp when the window resets

tools.name: playlists_create
tools.description: Create a new playlist for the authenticated user. Required: name. Optional: description, emoji, linkScope (plus 3 more). Returns the new PlaylistsCreateResponse.

params.name: emoji
params.description: Unicode emoji character for the playlist

params.name: password
params.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

params.name: visibility
params.description: Share with org or keep personal (default: personal)

tools.name: playlists_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a playlist. Videos in the playlist are not deleted. Required: id. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: playlists_get
tools.description: Returns detailed information about a playlist including its videos. Required: id.

tools.name: playlists_list
tools.description: Returns a list of all playlists for the authenticated user. Optional: visibility (default: personal), cursor, limit.

params.name: visibility
params.description: Filter by visibility: personal (only your playlists) or org (shared with organization). Default: personal

tools.name: playlists_update
tools.description: Update a playlist's name and/or description. Required: id. Optional: description, linkScope, name (plus 2 more). Returns the updated PlaylistsUpdateResponse.

params.name: password
params.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

tools.name: playlists_videos_add-to-playlist
tools.description: Adds an existing video to the specified playlist. Required: id, videoId. Returns the new SuccessResponse.

params.name: videoId
params.description: ID of the video to add to the playlist

tools.name: playlists_videos_remove-from-playlist
tools.description: Removes a video from the specified playlist. The video itself is not deleted. Required: id, videoId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a video. Required: id. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_get
tools.description: Returns detailed information about a video including chapters, transcript, and thumbnails. Required: id.

tools.name: videos_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of all videos for the authenticated user. Use playlistId query parameter to filter videos by playlist. Optional: cursor, limit, playlistId.

tools.name: videos_update
tools.description: Update a video's settings including viewer options, download permissions, access controls, and metadata. Some features require Premium plan. Required: id. Optional: allowedEmbedDomains, captionsDefaultEnabled, commentEmailsEnabled (plus 13 more). Returns the updated VideosUpdateResponse.

params.name: allowedEmbedDomains
params.description: Restrict embedding to these domains only (Premium feature). Empty array allows all domains.

params.name: commentEmailsEnabled
params.description: Send email notifications for new comments

params.name: defaultPlaybackRate
params.description: Default playback speed (0.5-2.0). Viewers can still adjust.

params.name: downloadsEnabled
params.description: Allow viewers to download the video

params.name: linkScope
params.description: Access level: public (anyone with link), private (org members only), password (requires password), embedonly (only viewable when embedded)

params.name: password
params.description: Password for viewing. Required when linkScope is 'password', ignored otherwise.

params.name: publishDateEnabled
params.description: Show publish date on video page

params.name: rawDownloadsEnabled
params.description: Allow viewers to download raw source files

params.name: searchEngineIndexingEnabled
params.description: Allow search engines to index the video page

params.name: viewCountEnabled
params.description: Show view count on video page

tools.name: videos_clips_add-blur
tools.description: Adds a blur mask to a clip. Always targets the subject screen layer (the only supported target). Required: id, clipId, dimensions, durationMs, point, startTimeMs. Returns the new ClipMaskResponse.

params.name: point
params.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

tools.name: videos_clips_add-highlight
tools.description: Adds a highlight mask to a clip. Always targets the subject screen layer (the only supported target). Required: id, clipId, dimensions, durationMs, point, startTimeMs. Returns the new ClipMaskResponse.

params.name: point
params.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

tools.name: videos_clips_add-layout
tools.description: Adds a layout to a clip. Provide both startTimeMs and durationMs for a time-ranged layout, or omit both for a clip-spanning layout. Required: id, clipId, layout. Optional: durationMs, media, startTimeMs (plus 1 more). Returns the new ClipLayoutResponse.

params.name: durationMs
params.description: Optional. Provide together with startTimeMs for a time-ranged layout.

params.name: layout
params.description: Structured layout description, discriminated by `kind`. Valid kinds depend on the clip's `layoutSceneType` and the story's aspect ratio; the server validates the kind+fields and returns a 400 if they don't fit.

params.name: media
params.description: Optional media content to show during this layout. Only valid on time-ranged layouts.

params.name: startTimeMs
params.description: Optional. Provide together with durationMs for a time-ranged layout.

params.name: transitionStyle
params.description: Optional. Only valid on time-ranged layouts. Defaults to the clip's setting when omitted.

tools.name: videos_clips_add-zoom
tools.description: Add a zoom to a clip. Required: id, clipId, durationMs, startTimeMs, type. Optional: focusPoint, scale. Returns the new ClipZoomResponse.

params.name: focusPoint
params.description: Point on the screen recording to zoom into, expressed as percentages of the screen dimensions. Required for `manualZoom`; ignored for `trackingZoom`.

params.name: type
params.description: `manualZoom` zooms into a fixed `focusPoint` on the screen. `trackingZoom` automatically follows the cursor in the screen recording.

tools.name: videos_clips_cut
tools.description: Cut a time range from a clip. Overlapping or adjacent ranges are merged into the existing cuts. To clear all cuts, call updateClip with cuts: []. Required: id, clipId, fromMs, toMs. Returns the new GetClipResponse.

params.name: fromMs
params.description: Start of the range to cut, in milliseconds from the clip's start.

params.name: toMs
params.description: End of the range to cut, in milliseconds from the clip's start. Clamped to the clip's max duration.

tools.name: videos_clips_delete
tools.description: Removes a clip from its video. The underlying recording is preserved. Required: id, clipId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_clips_duplicate
tools.description: Duplicates an existing clip in its video. By default the new clip is inserted right after the source. Required: id, clipId. Optional: name, order. Returns the new GetClipResponse.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the duplicated clip (defaults to the source clip name)

params.name: order
params.description: Position to insert the new clip (defaults to right after the source)

tools.name: videos_clips_get
tools.description: Returns a single clip in a video. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-cut-transcript
tools.description: Returns the words spoken in a clip with cuts applied — what viewers actually hear. Times are in ms relative to the clip's playback start. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-silences
tools.description: Returns silent ranges in a clip's audio. Required: id, clipId. Optional: minDurationMs.

params.name: minDurationMs
params.description: Minimum silence duration to report, in ms. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-source-thumbnail
tools.description: Get a thumbnail of a source. If you pass `width`/`height`, the aspect ratio must match the source's native ratio. Omit both to default to the source's native size. Required: id, clipId, sourceId. Optional: format, inpointMs, durationMs (plus 4 more). Returns the ThumbnailResponse.

params.name: inpointMs
params.description: Frame offset in ms from the source's start. Defaults to 0.

params.name: durationMs
params.description: Duration of the animated preview in ms. Only valid when format is gif or mp4.

params.name: download
params.description: Suggest a download disposition on the signed URL.

params.name: response
params.description: Set to 'json' to receive `{url}` instead of the default 302 redirect.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-source-waveform
tools.description: Returns the audio waveform JSON for a source in BBC audiowaveform format. Use the `data` array to render a custom waveform visualization. Required: id, clipId, sourceId.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-thumbnail
tools.description: Returns a signed CDN URL for a still image (jpg/png/webp) or animated preview (gif/mp4) of a clip. By default returns a 302 redirect to the URL — set `?response=json` to get `{url}` JSON instead. `inpointMs` is clip-relative (recording time, ignores cuts). `durationMs` only applies to gif/mp4. Required: id, clipId. Optional: format, inpointMs, durationMs (plus 4 more).

params.name: inpointMs
params.description: Frame offset in ms from the clip's start. Defaults to 0.

params.name: durationMs
params.description: Duration of the animated preview in ms. Only valid when format is gif or mp4.

params.name: download
params.description: Suggest a download disposition on the signed URL.

params.name: response
params.description: Set to 'json' to receive `{url}` instead of the default 302 redirect.

tools.name: videos_clips_get-uncut-transcript
tools.description: Returns the words spoken in a clip without cuts applied. Times are in ms relative to the source's start. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_list
tools.description: Returns the clips of a video in playback order. Required: id.

tools.name: videos_clips_list-blurs
tools.description: List blurs on a clip. Required: id, clipId. Returns the ListClipMasksResponse.

tools.name: videos_clips_list-highlights
tools.description: List highlights on a clip. Required: id, clipId. Returns the ListClipMasksResponse.

tools.name: videos_clips_list-layouts
tools.description: Returns the layouts (sections) attached to a clip. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_list-sources
tools.description: Returns the underlying sources used by a clip's layers. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_list-zooms
tools.description: Returns the zoom effects on a clip. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_remove-blur
tools.description: Remove a blur. Required: id, clipId, maskId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_clips_remove-fillers
tools.description: Detects filler words ('um', 'uh', 'hmm', etc.) and adds cuts that bracket each filler. New cuts are merged with any existing cuts. Returns the updated clip. Required: id, clipId.

tools.name: videos_clips_remove-highlight
tools.description: Remove a highlight. Required: id, clipId, maskId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_clips_remove-layout
tools.description: Remove a layout. Required: id, clipId, layoutId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_clips_remove-zoom
tools.description: Remove a zoom. Required: id, clipId, zoomId. Returns the SuccessResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: videos_clips_reorder
tools.description: Moves a clip to a new position within its video. Other clips are renumbered to keep ordering contiguous. Required: id, clipId, order. Returns the new GetClipResponse.

params.name: order
params.description: New position for the clip (0 = first)

tools.name: videos_clips_update
tools.description: Update a clip's name, ordering, cuts, background, or transition. At least one field must be provided. Required: id, clipId. Optional: background, cuts, name (plus 1 more). Returns the updated GetClipResponse.

params.name: background
params.description: Clip background. Use type = 'solid' with `color`, type = 'image' with `imageUrl`, type = 'video' with `videoUrl` + `videoDurationSeconds`, or type = 'gradient' with `gradientColor1`, `gradientColor2`, `gradientAngle`.

params.name: cuts
params.description: Replaces the clip's cuts. Total cut duration must be less than `maxDurationSeconds`.

params.name: order
params.description: New position of the clip within the video

tools.name: videos_clips_update-blur
tools.description: Update a blur. Required: id, clipId, maskId. Optional: dimensions, durationMs, point (plus 1 more). Returns the updated ClipMaskResponse.

params.name: point
params.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

tools.name: videos_clips_update-highlight
tools.description: Update a highlight. Required: id, clipId, maskId. Optional: dimensions, durationMs, point (plus 1 more). Returns the updated ClipMaskResponse.

params.name: point
params.description: Top-left corner of the masked rectangle (percentages)

tools.name: videos_clips_update-layout
tools.description: Update a layout. Required: id, clipId, layoutId. Optional: durationMs, layout, media (plus 2 more). Returns the updated ClipLayoutResponse.

params.name: layout
params.description: Structured layout description, discriminated by `kind`. Valid kinds depend on the clip's `layoutSceneType` and the story's aspect ratio; the server validates the kind+fields and returns a 400 if they don't fit.

params.name: media
params.description: Replace the layout's media content. Only valid on time-ranged layouts; rejected on the base (clip-spanning) layout.

params.name: transitionStyle
params.description: Only valid on time-ranged layouts; rejected on the base (clip-spanning) layout.

tools.name: videos_clips_update-zoom
tools.description: Update a zoom. Required: id, clipId, zoomId. Optional: durationMs, focusPoint, scale (plus 2 more). Returns the updated ClipZoomResponse.

params.name: focusPoint
params.description: Point on the screen recording to zoom into, expressed as percentages of the screen dimensions. Required for `manualZoom`; ignored for `trackingZoom`.

params.name: type
params.description: `manualZoom` zooms into a fixed `focusPoint` on the screen. `trackingZoom` automatically follows the cursor in the screen recording.

tools.name: videos_collaborators_add-to-video
tools.description: Grants access to a video for the specified user. The user must be a member of your workspace. Required: id, email, role. Returns the new AddCollaboratorResponse.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address of the user to add. Must be a member of your workspace.

params.name: role
params.description: Role to grant. Allowed values: 'editor' or 'viewer'.

tools.name: videos_duplicate_video
tools.description: Creates a copy of the specified video. Optionally specify a new name for the duplicate. Required: id. Optional: name, trim. Returns the new DuplicateVideoResponse.

params.name: name
params.description: Name for the duplicated video. Defaults to original name with ' (Copy)' suffix.

params.name: trim
params.description: Optional trim parameters. Specify startTime+endTime for time range trim (duration must be at least 1 second), or chapterIndex to extract a specific chapter.

tools.name: videos_exports_video
tools.description: Starts an export of the specified video. Returns the export status including download URL when completed. Required: id. Optional: fps, granularity, resolution (plus 2 more).

params.name: fps
params.description: Frames per second. 60fps may require paid plan.

params.name: granularity
params.description: Export granularity: video (full video), clips (one file per clip), raw (original uploads)

tools.name: videos_thumbnail_get-video
tools.description: Returns a signed CDN URL for a still image (jpg/png/webp) or animated preview (gif/mp4) of a video at a video-relative time. By default returns a 302 redirect — set `?response=json` to get `{url}` JSON instead. Required: id. Optional: format, inpointMs, durationMs (plus 4 more).

params.name: inpointMs
params.description: Frame offset in ms from the clip's start. Defaults to 0.

params.name: durationMs
params.description: Duration of the animated preview in ms. Only valid when format is gif or mp4.

params.name: download
params.description: Suggest a download disposition on the signed URL.

params.name: response
params.description: Set to 'json' to receive `{url}` instead of the default 302 redirect.

tools.name: webhooks_create-endpoint
tools.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint to receive events. Returns the endpoint ID and signing secret. Required: filterTypes, url.

params.name: filterTypes
params.description: Event types to subscribe to (e.g., video.created, export.ready)

params.name: url
params.description: The URL where webhook events will be sent

tools.name: webhooks_delete-endpoint
tools.description: Permanently deletes a webhook endpoint. Required: id. Returns the DeleteEndpointResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_get-endpoint-secret
tools.description: Retrieves the signing secret for a webhook endpoint. Use this to verify incoming webhook payloads. Required: id. Returns the EndpointSecretResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_get-message
tools.description: Returns details of a specific webhook message by ID. Required: id.

tools.name: webhooks_list-messages
tools.description: Returns a list of recently sent webhook messages for debugging purposes. Optional: event_types, limit.

params.name: event_types
params.description: Comma-separated list of event types to filter by

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 10)
